prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为18930→18798→21046→17588→16764，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小），近3年从21046持续前移至16764，累计前移约4282名；2025年基准约16764名，为近5年最优水平；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021年75人、2022年74人、2023年74人、2024年70人、2025年76人；2026年计划82人，较2025年增加6人（扩招约7.9%），扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第73名，近年排名在60–73名区间波动，整体处于中上水平；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档事件；抖音综合热度一般，未进入全国高校热度前100名，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度相对平稳；该校以石油石化特色见长，石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势领域。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，对高分考生吸引力强；化工与制药类、材料类等属明显劝退方向，可能拉低整体报考热度。重庆市物理类考生2021年98,954人→2025年139,478人持续增长，2026年估算约136,895人，较2025年略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；2026年；该校位于山东青岛，非重庆本地高校，无本地招生倾斜；在重庆招生计划占比较小（约70–80人/年），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次16764名、2026年扩招约7.9%（扩招使位次后移）、重庆物理类考生略减（使位次前移）、声誉平稳、专业热度分化等因素，扩招效应略大于考生减少效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（位次数字增大），预测最低位次约17528名，区间17028–18028名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间17028–18028名内，建议以二档专业为主力选择（如机械类、数学类、会计学、碳储科学与工程），一档专业（电气、自动化、软件工程等）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（应用化学、管理科学与工程类等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<17028名）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>18028名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18930 → 18798 → 21046 → 17588 → 16764, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers). In the past 3 years, it has continuously moved forward from 21046 to 16764, with a cumulative forward shift of about 4282 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 16764, the best level in the past 5 years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 75 in 2021, 74 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 70 in 2024, and 76 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 82, an increase of 6 from 2025 (an expansion of about 7.9%), which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 73rd, fluctuating between 60th and 73rd in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. Its overall popularity on Douyin is average, not in the top 100 national university popularity rankings, with low short video exposure and relatively stable application attention. The university is known for its petroleum and petrochemical specialties, with petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering as traditional advantageous fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science are consistently highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates. Majors like Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, and Materials Science are clearly discouraged directions, potentially lowering overall application enthusiasm. The number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing grew continuously from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with an estimated 136,895 in 2026, a slight decrease from 2025, slightly easing competition. The university is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university in Chongqing, with no local enrollment preference. Its enrollment plan in Chongqing is relatively small (about 70–80 per year), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16764, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.9% (which shifts the ranking backward), the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates in Chongqing (which shifts the ranking forward), stable reputation, and polarized major popularity, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the candidate reduction effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward (ranking number increases) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 17528, in the range of 17028–18028.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17028–18028, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Mechanical, Mathematics, Accounting, Carbon Storage Science and Engineering) as primary choices, with Tier 1 majors (Electrical, Automation, Software Engineering, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors (Applied Chemistry, Management Science and Engineering, etc.) as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<17028), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors; for rankings near the upper bound (>18028), it is advisable to rely on Tier 3 safety options.
